message: Jake
Yuriko
Kristy
Serial Murder Case
Ginny
Boss, great job!
You heard that whole exchange, right?
Saying I heard it makes it sound bad. In such a small space, even if you don't want to, you're gonna pick up on things!
Well, now that you mention it, that's true.
Right, exactly.
Ugh.
Hmm.
My head hurts.
Did I drink too much yesterday?
Good morning!
Good morning!
Yay! It's such a nice day today. I'm gonna give it my all!
Could you keep it down a bit?
Oh, what's wrong?
Ah.
Rare to see you hungover, huh?!
That's why I'm asking you to keep it down.
Hah.
Yeah.
I'll try to be careful.
Thanks.
Thank you.
Did you go to Rain Tree yesterday?
Yeah.
It's been a super long time, hasn't it? Well, you've been really busy lately, so I get it.
Yeah.
But, didn't Ash complain about you not coming around anymore? He'd be all like, 'Where have you been?' Hehe.
Ugh
Yeah, well...
Boss, please do your best today too!
Boss, I got a call from Tony Ford reminding you not to forget the promise.
Oh, really?
Wait, it's already 5 o'clock!? This is bad, I'm gonna be late!
Boss!
You're such a klutz.
Well then, I'm off!
Be careful!
Boss.
You’re not bringing anything unnecessary, right?
Ah.
Welcome back, Boss!
Good job!

With me
There’s just an office desk for us, a potted plant with shabby leaves, and a not-so-old model computer.
It’s a dark office with only a bit of sunlight coming in from the west-facing window, but it’s not worth complaining about. This is how it starts.
With me
There are no customers, of course. Besides, having too many requests at a small office like ours would be a hassle.
She has the fine skin typical of East Asians and straight, brownish hair. She has an adorable face, so why don’t any guys approach her?
She wears a red suit that’s almost like a uniform. Maybe I should buy her some clothes once in a while.
She seems dependable, but is a bit scatterbrained. I wonder how someone like her manages to get by in New York.
Boss, you’re quite popular, huh? Everyone probably doesn’t realize who you really are.
Who is everyone, anyway? Even Eva is just teasing for fun, and I’m not popular at all.
Really?
I think you’re pretty well-liked.
If the reality were known, though, your popularity might plummet.
Hehe.
Boss, whether you’re hungover or whatever, please take work seriously.
You’ve never done anything less than serious work, right?
Isn't being lazy and unmotivated just being irresponsible?
Like that,
what do you do every day?
I’m creating a database of detective patterns in literary history and crime patterns in American history.
Wow, that’s amazing.
It’s just a hobby.
Hehe.
I’m a woman who lives for her hobbies. Hehe.
Meryl participated in the shoot. She played a more subdued role than her usual image.
Actresses are incredible, aren't they? They can completely become someone totally different.
Yeah, well, that’s their job.
When she talked to me, she was the same as usual.
It would be strange if Meryl became quiet.
You know, Meryl was criticizing Cindy's absence while putting herself on a pedestal.
It’s troubling even though they’re parent and child.
Well, it can't be helped since she doesn’t know yet, but I wonder how she would change if she found out she was her daughter.
That’s a bit creepy.
If we can meet safely as parent and child, my work will also be wrapped up.
You told Meryl about your daughter, right?
Yeah.
She wasn't at the hotel, so I think she's probably working?
I see, that's good.
Meryl probably has a lot going on, but I want her to do her best going forward.
Are you keeping it a secret from Meryl that Cindy is her daughter?
From what I’ve heard so far, it seems she doesn’t think too highly of Cindy.
It’s a bit hard to bring up.
But once she finds out, I think her attitude will change completely. Don’t you think?
It would be scary if her attitude changed drastically though. Hehe.
You haven’t heard anything from her, right?
Nothing at all.
Did something happen?
No, I was unusually absent.
I do go out, you know. You're worrying too much, Boss. I mean, that last time I felt unwell was just temporary.
Isn't it a good thing that I've regained the energy to go out? I think we should celebrate that.
How are you doing, San?
That last state was really bad.
But I think it was just temporary.
Like I suddenly saw an article about Guy and got flustered.
I hope everything's alright.
By the way, Boss, about Cindy.
Have you contacted Gloria since then?
No, I haven't spoken to her.
Shouldn't you at least apologize over the phone?
Why?
Because, in the end, it was you who got in the way of Gloria bringing Cindy back, and that must be tough work.
Boss, you really should make that call.
Was Cindy convinced?
We won't get a conclusion on whether Cindy will meet her mother for another week.
A week away!? Why?
She says she won't settle down until Tim's audition is over. So she wants you to wait.
Saying you can’t wait would be quite rude.
Cindy's lucky to have someone who thinks about her that much.
Did you get to meet Cindy?
I could meet her, but she seems really troubled.
I guess it's shocking for her, with a biological parent suddenly appearing?
We really need her to give us the green light.
Boss, hurry up and get an OK from Cindy. Otherwise, Meryl will get mad at you.
Günter won't meet with me.
Of course, he’s a busy doctor. If you want to see him that much, you have to become a patient.
You’re being way too bold. Just showing up unannounced to see a busy teacher is unbelievable.
No way, you didn't actually go to see Gunter, did you?
Nah, I didn't.
Good. It would be a hassle for the teacher if the boss showed up.
Listen, you shouldn’t go and disturb.
I haven’t heard a peep from Gabriela.
Not even a little bit.
Did you find any clues?
When I visited, the company was closed.
Maybe they just happen to be off today? They could have a founding anniversary or something.
The boss seems like a worried dad lately.
Gabriela must be tired too.
Well, everyone gets tired sometimes.
That’s true.
There’s no way anyone would be cheerful when their employees might be having a tough time.
I think Gabriela is under a lot of stress.
Tim is such a lucky guy, huh? It’s so annoying!
Cindy is just a normal girl too.
I’m just a normal girl. I'm going to find an even cooler guy than Tim and show Cindy!
Tim is auditioning to become a professional musician.
Oh really?
Is that so? But with that face, it might be a bit tough, right? Poor thing.
If he’s liked by Cindy, he must have a good personality.
I can’t see Tim and Cindy as a match.
Why not?
Because Cindy is a super popular talent.
I bet she has her pick of guys.
I don't get Cindy's hobbies.
I met Tony at the location shooting site.
Wh-what are you saying so leisurely!? What happened to Tony?
We made plans to meet at night.
Boss, it’s definitely better if you take a weapon.
What kind of wind is blowing Tony's way?
How should I know?
Aren't you feeling any danger going alone?
Not really.
Ah, you really need to be more cautious.
Boss, please be careful. If anything happens to you,
I, I
won't get my paycheck!
Tony isn't at home, is he?
Of course not, he must be on the run.
You can't assume he's the culprit yet.
Yeah.
B-but he's the most suspicious, isn't he?
Tony has a reason not to want to meet the boss. It's because he's the culprit.
Yeah, yeah, that's definitely it.
We have to catch Tony! Go to Tony's house and secure him!
Do you think they're still alive? Maybe they were killed by the serial murder case culprit.
Don't say such reckless things.
But, a hand was sent.
Wouldn't the culprit not do something like sending a hand?
Well, when you put it that way, it's true.
If she's alive, where could she be?
Eva is a going-my-way kind of person, right? I’m impressed.
Impressed? More like amazed.
But she did say something interesting.
About the culprit.
I don't know if it's true, but if it is, she’s putting herself in danger.
That's right, but she seems really confident.
I wonder if she's okay?
It's not that I like Eva, but I can't help but feel worried.
I ran into Jennifer at the location shooting site.
Boss, are you fanboying over Jennifer?
Not exactly, but still.
Oh come on, you're definitely smitten. Hehe.
What kind of woman do you think Jennifer is?
I don’t really know yet. I just think she might not be who the rumors say she is.
I think the bad rumors come from her having that kind of side, but in her case, I wonder if it's coming from jealousy.
I'm curious about what kind of person Jennifer is.
I met Jennifer at Rain Tree.
Oh really?
Is Jennifer a customer at that place too?
I hear,
it's a shop I often go to.
Huh?
Did I mention that? I don't remember.
Right?
If I did, it must have been at the party.
But I was nervous back then, so I don't recall what I talked about.
But Jennifer said,
she heard it from you.
In that case, I must have talked about it, for sure.
Oh no, I might be super forgetful.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
